signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation at 2.2% YoY, Below Consensus Forecasts of 2.3-2.4% | NO | HIGH confidence**

South Korea's annual consumer price inflation rose to **2.2%** in March 2026 from 2.0% in February, driven by oil prices but contained by government fuel caps and food vouchers; this undershot market expectations and marks no upward surprise[1][2][3]. Core inflation (ex-food/energy)
